notes: RTH preset, default 10% equity sizing. Requested NASDAQ:TSLA resolved to BATS:TSLA. Top-line metrics API reported trade_count=185 vs all.total_trades=184 (winning 78 + losing 106 = 184); used 184 as the canonical n, matching the win/loss breakdown. n=184 >= 100 (sufficient). WR 42.39% misses the 45% branch; PF 0.98 misses both the 1.3 and 1.6 thresholds. maxDD 1.17% well under 15% cap. Long side alone was profitable (PF 1.21, 90 trades, +0.35% net) but short side was negative (PF 0.78, 94 trades, -0.42% net), netting to a small overall loss -- closest to passing of the three symbols but still fails on the combined PF.
